emails.subject: 1/31/01 Checkout
emails.body: 1/31/01 Checkout MIKE SWERZBIN I am missing the following deals per Amerex: Mike Swerzbin sells El Paso Cal'02 PV at $139.00 peak hrs. Mike Swerzbin buys Puget Sound February Mid-C $400.00 peak hrs. CHRIS MALLORY: Chris Mallory: Amerex does not recognize deal 508224 I am confirming with Prebon right now...so I may have more discrepancies.. Thanks!
